title: CaVulner: Automated Context-Aware Identification of Vulnerable Versions

evidence_units.text_anchor: 3 Approach To handle these limitations, we propose CaVulner, which integrates multi-source context and leverages the capabilities of LLMs in vulnerability analysis and code understanding to identify vulnerable versions.
